title: fix: cancel stale prettify/translate on category switch
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: No more crossed wires
gist.blurb: Fixed a visual glitch where old app descriptions would ghost into new categories if you clicked too fast. The UI is now as snappy as your clicking finger.
gist.summary: Added abort flags to the prettify and translate hooks to discard stale async results when switching app categories.
gist.impact: Users will no longer see a flash of incorrect descriptions when rapidly switching between app categories on the frontend.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes a glitch where old text/translations bleed into new categories when switching fast. Metaphor: cleaning up old papers/text quickly. Characters: Polly the bee and Nomnom creature. Nomnom eating the old/stale text documents so they don't clutter the new category.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old stale text documents while the cute bee mascot watches amused, holding a fresh clean clipboard. A retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
